name: Amulet of Dispersion
description: Notes A strange ring that provides a small amount of every stat bonus, less than half of the Omnipotence Ring. While it might be alright if obtained early, the stats aren’t great. Players are advised to equip a ring that focuses on a specific stat, like an HP ring.
effects: +40 HP, +40 MP, +2 ATT, +2 DEF, +2 SPD, +2 DEX, +2 VIT, +2 WIS
Forgotten Power: On taking damage when below 20% HP, gain 120 HP. Cooldown: 1800 seconds (30 minutes)
